3.name: Frenzy Plant
3.description: The user slams the target with the roots of an enormous tree. The user can't move on the next turn.

3.name: Giga Impact
3.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

3.name: Hyper Beam
3.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

3.name: Leaf Storm
3.description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

3.name: Double-Edge
3.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

3.name: Outrage
3.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

3.name: Petal Dance
3.description: The user attacks the target by scattering petals for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

3.name: Power Whip
3.description: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to lash the target.

3.name: Solar Beam
3.description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

3.name: Earthquake
3.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

3.name: Earth Power
3.description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

3.name: Energy Ball
3.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

3.name: Petal Blizzard
3.description: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

3.name: Rock Climb
3.description: A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It can also be used to scale rocky walls.

3.name: Sludge Bomb
3.description: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

3.name: Take Down
3.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

3.name: Body Slam
3.description: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

3.name: Grass Pledge
3.description: A column of grass hits the target. When used with its water counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast swamp appears.

3.name: Poison Jab
3.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, an arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

3.name: Seed Bomb
3.description: The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

3.name: Strength
3.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power.

3.name: Tera Blast
3.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

3.name: Giga Drain
3.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

3.name: Stomping Tantrum
3.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

3.name: Facade
3.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

3.name: Headbutt
3.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

3.name: Secret Power
3.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

3.name: Knock Off
3.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

3.name: Venoshock
3.description: The user drenches the target in a special poisonous liquid. This move's power is doubled if the target is poisoned.

3.name: Bulldoze
3.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

3.name: Hidden Power
3.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

3.name: Magical Leaf
3.description: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack never misses.

3.name: Round
3.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

3.name: Grassy Glide
3.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

3.name: Razor Leaf
3.description: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

3.name: Cut
3.description: Cuts using claws, scythes, etc.

3.name: Snore
3.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

3.name: Terrain Pulse
3.description: The user utilizes the energy of the terrain to attack. This move’s type and power change depending on the terrain at the time the move is used.

3.name: Trailblaze
3.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

3.name: Weather Ball
3.description: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

3.name: Vine Whip
3.description: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines to inflict damage.

3.name: Acid Spray
3.description: The user attacks by spitting fluid that works to melt the target. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

3.name: Echoed Voice
3.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.

3.name: False Swipe
3.description: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

3.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with scythes, claws, or the like. This attack becomes more powerful if it hits in succession.

3.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

3.name: Rock Smash
3.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

3.name: Tackle
3.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

3.name: Bullet Seed
3.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

3.name: Mud-Slap
3.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

3.name: Rage
3.description: Raises ATTACK if the user is hit.

3.name: Bind
3.description: A long body, tentacles, or the like are used to bind and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

3.name: Bide
3.description: Waits 2-3 turns & hits back double.

3.name: Frustration
3.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

3.name: Grass Knot
3.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

3.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

3.name: Return
3.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

3.name: Amnesia
3.description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

3.name: Attract
3.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

3.name: Block
3.description: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent the target from fleeing.

3.name: Captivate
3.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

3.name: Charm
3.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

3.name: Confide
3.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

3.name: Curse
3.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

3.name: Defense Curl
3.description: The user curls up and boosts its Defense stat.

3.name: Double Team
3.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

3.name: Endure
3.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

3.name: Flash
3.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

3.name: Grassy Terrain
3.description: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

3.name: Growl
3.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

3.name: Growth
3.description: The user's body grows all at once, boosting the Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

3.name: Helping Hand
3.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

3.name: Ingrain
3.description: The user lays roots that restore its own HP every turn. Because the user is now rooted, it can't switch out.

3.name: Leech Seed
3.description: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

3.name: Light Screen
3.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

3.name: Mimic
3.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

3.name: Nature Power
3.description: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

3.name: Poison Powder
3.description: The user scatters a cloud of poisonous dust that poisons the target.

3.name: Protect
3.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

3.name: Reflect
3.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

3.name: Rest
3.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

3.name: Roar
3.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

3.name: Safeguard
3.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

3.name: Scary Face
3.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

3.name: Sleep Powder
3.description: The user scatters a cloud of soporific dust that puts the target to sleep.

3.name: Sleep Talk
3.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

3.name: String Shot
3.description: The user blows silk from its mouth that binds opposing Pokémon and harshly lowers their Speed stats.

3.name: Substitute
3.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

3.name: Sunny Day

3.name: Swagger

3.name: Sweet Scent

3.name: Swords Dance

3.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

3.name: Work Up
3.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

3.name: Worry Seed

9.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

9.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

9.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

9.name: Confide

9.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

18.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

18.name: Tackle
18.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

18.name: Twister
18.description: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.

18.name: Mud-Slap
18.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

18.name: Rage
18.description: Raises ATTACK if the user is hit.

18.name: Bide
18.description: Waits 2-3 turns & hits back double.

18.name: Frustration
18.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

18.name: Natural Gift
18.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

18.name: Return
18.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

18.name: Agility
18.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

18.name: Attract
18.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

18.name: Captivate
18.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

18.name: Confide
18.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

18.name: Curse
18.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

18.name: Defog
18.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

18.name: Detect
18.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

18.name: Double Team
18.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

18.name: Endure
18.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

18.name: Feather Dance
18.description: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

18.name: Laser Focus
18.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

18.name: Mimic
18.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

18.name: Mirror Move
18.description: Counters with the same move.

18.name: Protect
18.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

18.name: Rain Dance
18.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

18.name: Reflect
18.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

18.name: Rest
18.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

18.name: Roost
18.description: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

18.name: Sand Attack
18.description: Sand is hurled in the target's face, lowering the target's accuracy.

18.name: Sleep Talk
18.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

18.name: Substitute
18.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

18.name: Sunny Day
18.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

18.name: Swagger
18.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

18.name: Tailwind
18.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

18.name: Toxic
18.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

18.name: Whirlwind
18.description: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

18.name: Work Up
18.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

25.name: Focus Punch
25.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

25.name: Skull Bash
25.description: 1st turn: Prepare 2nd turn: Attack

25.name: Double-Edge
25.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

25.name: Mega Kick
25.description: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

25.name: Volt Tackle
25.description: A life-risking tackle that slightly hurts the user.

25.name: Zap Cannon
25.description: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

25.name: Thunder
25.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

25.name: Dynamic Punch
25.description: The user attacks by punching the target with full concentrated power. This also confuses the target.

25.name: Iron Tail
25.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

25.name: Play Rough
25.description: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

25.name: Surf
25.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

25.name: Take Down
25.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

25.name: Thunderbolt
25.description: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

25.name: Uproar
25.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

25.name: Wild Charge
25.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

25.name: Body Slam
25.description: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

25.name: Alluring Voice
25.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

25.name: Dig
25.description: The user burrows into the ground on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

25.name: Discharge
25.description: The user strikes everything around it by letting loose a flare of electricity. This may also leave those hit by the attack with paralysis.

25.name: Mega Punch
25.description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

25.name: Slam
25.description: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, or the like to inflict damage.

25.name: Strength
25.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power.

25.name: Submission
25.description: An attack that al­ so hurts the user.

25.name: Tera Blast
25.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

25.name: Brick Break
25.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

25.name: Signal Beam
25.description: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

25.name: Thunder Punch
25.description: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

25.name: Facade
25.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

25.name: Headbutt
25.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

25.name: Rising Voltage
25.description: The user attacks with electricity rising from the ground. This move's power is doubled if the target is on Electric Terrain.

25.name: Secret Power
25.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

25.name: Volt Switch
25.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

25.name: Knock Off
25.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

25.name: Spark
25.description: The user attacks the target with an electrically charged tackle. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

25.name: Upper Hand
25.description: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

25.name: Covet
25.description: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

25.name: Hidden Power
25.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

25.name: Round
25.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

25.name: Shock Wave
25.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

25.name: Swift
25.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

25.name: Thief
25.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

25.name: Electroweb
25.description: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

25.name: Charge Beam
25.description: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

25.name: Draining Kiss
25.description: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

25.name: Snore
25.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

25.name: Trailblaze
25.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

25.name: Disarming Voice
25.description: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

25.name: Echoed Voice
25.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.

25.name: Pay Day
25.description: Coins are hurled at the target to inflict damage. Money is earned after the battle.

25.name: Rock Smash
25.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

25.name: Thunder Shock
25.description: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

25.name: Double Kick
25.description: The user attacks by kicking the target twice in a row using two feet.

25.name: Feint
25.description: This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect. This also lifts the effects of those moves.

25.name: Rollout
25.description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

25.name: Mud-Slap

25.name: Nuzzle

26.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

26.name: Light Screen
26.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

26.name: Magnet Rise
26.description: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

26.name: Mimic
26.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

26.name: Nasty Plot
26.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

26.name: Play Nice
26.description: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

26.name: Protect
26.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

26.name: Rain Dance
26.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

26.name: Reflect
26.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

26.name: Rest
26.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

26.name: Safeguard
26.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

26.name: Sleep Talk
26.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

26.name: Speed Swap
26.description: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.

26.name: Substitute
26.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

26.name: Swagger
26.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

26.name: Sweet Kiss
26.description: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.

26.name: Tail Whip
26.description: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Defense stats.

26.name: Thunder Wave
26.description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

26.name: Toxic
26.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

36.name: Focus Punch
36.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

36.name: Giga Impact
36.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

36.name: Hyper Beam
36.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

36.name: Last Resort
36.description: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

36.name: Skull Bash
36.description: 1st turn: Prepare 2nd turn: Attack

36.name: Double-Edge
36.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

36.name: Focus Blast
36.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

36.name: Future Sight
36.description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

36.name: Mega Kick
36.description: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

36.name: Meteor Beam
36.description: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

36.name: Solar Beam
36.description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

36.name: Zap Cannon
36.description: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

36.name: Blizzard
36.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

36.name: Fire Blast
36.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

36.name: Thunder
36.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

36.name: Dream Eater
36.description: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

36.description: The user attacks by punching the target with full concentrated power. This also confuses the target.

36.name: Iron Tail
36.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

36.description: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

36.name: Flamethrower
36.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

36.name: Hyper Voice

36.name: Ice Beam
36.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

36.name: Meteor Mash
36.description: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. This may also boost the user’s Attack stat.

36.name: Play Rough
36.description: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

36.name: Psychic
36.description: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

36.name: Take Down
36.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

36.name: Thunderbolt
36.description: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

36.name: Uproar
36.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

36.name: Body Slam
36.description: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

36.name: Bounce
36.description: The user bounces up high on the first turn, then drops onto the target on the next turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

36.name: Alluring Voice
36.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

36.name: Dazzling Gleam
36.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

36.name: Dig
36.description: The user burrows into the ground on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

36.name: Mega Punch
36.description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

36.name: Psyshock
36.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

36.name: Shadow Ball
36.description: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

36.name: Strength
36.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power.

36.name: Submission
36.description: An attack that al­ so hurts the user.

36.name: Tera Blast
36.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

36.name: Tri Attack
36.description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

36.name: Zen Headbutt
36.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

36.name: Brick Break
36.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

36.name: Drain Punch
36.description: The user attacks with an energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

36.name: Fire Punch
36.description: The target is attacked with a fiery punch. This may also leave the target with a burn.

36.name: Ice Punch
36.description: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.

36.name: Mystical Fire
36.description: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

36.name: Signal Beam
36.description: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

36.name: Thunder Punch
36.description: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

36.name: Facade
36.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

36.name: Headbutt
36.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

36.name: Retaliate
36.description: The user takes revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is boosted if an ally fainted in the previous turn.

36.name: Secret Power
36.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

36.name: Bubble Beam
36.description: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target. This may also lower the target's Speed stat.

36.name: Knock Off
36.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

36.name: Psybeam
36.description: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This may also confuse the target.

36.name: Covet
36.description: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

36.name: Hidden Power
36.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

36.name: Incinerate
36.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with fire. If a Pokémon is holding a certain item, such as a Berry, the item becomes burned up and unusable.

36.name: Magical Leaf
36.description: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack never misses.

36.name: Round
36.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

36.name: Shock Wave
36.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

36.name: Swift
36.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

36.name: Thief
36.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

36.name: Water Pulse
36.description: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

36.name: Icy Wind
36.description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

36.name: Charge Beam
36.description: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

36.name: Chilling Water
36.description: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

36.name: Draining Kiss
36.description: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

36.name: Snore
36.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

36.name: Disarming Voice
36.description: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

36.name: Dual Wingbeat
36.description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

36.name: Echoed Voice
36.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.

36.name: Fairy Wind
36.description: The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target.

36.name: Pound
36.description: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

36.name: Power-Up Punch
36.description: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

36.name: Rock Smash
36.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

36.name: Tackle
36.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

36.name: Water Gun
36.description: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

36.name: Rollout
36.description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

36.name: Mud-Slap
36.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

36.name: Rage
36.description: Raises ATTACK if the user is hit.

36.name: Stored Power
36.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

36.name: Double Slap
36.description: Repeatedly slaps 2-5 times.

36.name: Bide
36.description: Waits 2-3 turns & hits back double.

36.name: Counter
36.description: A retaliatory attack that counters any physical move, inflicting double the damage taken.

36.name: Endeavor
36.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

36.name: Fling
36.description: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This move's power and effects depend on the item.

36.name: Frustration
36.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

36.name: Grass Knot
36.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

36.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

36.name: Night Shade
36.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

36.description: The user attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. The gift restores HP sometimes, however.

36.name: Psywave
36.description: An attack with variable power.

36.name: Return
36.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

36.name: Seismic Toss
36.description: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

36.description: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

36.description: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.

36.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

36.name: Calm Mind
36.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

36.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

36.name: Charm
36.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

36.name: Confide
36.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

36.description: The user mimics the move used immediately before it. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

36.description: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

36.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

36.name: Defense Curl

36.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

36.description: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

36.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

36.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

36.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

36.description: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

36.description: A sleeper loses 1/4 HP every turn.

36.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

36.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

36.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

36.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

38.description: The user traps the target inside a fierce vortex of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

38.description: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. This move hits two to five times in a row.

38.name: Rage
38.description: Raises ATTACK if the user is hit.

38.name: Stored Power
38.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

38.name: Bide
38.description: Waits 2-3 turns & hits back double.

38.name: Flail
38.description: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

38.name: Frustration
38.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

38.name: Natural Gift
38.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

38.name: Night Shade
38.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

38.name: Return
38.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

38.name: Agility
38.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

38.name: Attract
38.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

38.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
38.description: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.

38.name: Baton Pass
38.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

38.name: Calm Mind
38.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

38.name: Captivate
38.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

38.name: Charm
38.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

38.name: Confide
38.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

38.name: Confuse Ray
38.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

38.name: Curse
38.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

38.name: Disable
38.description: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.

38.name: Double Team
38.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

38.name: Encore
38.description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

38.name: Endure
38.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

38.name: Fake Tears
38.description: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

38.name: Grudge
38.description: If the user faints, deletes the PP of the final move.

38.name: Healing Wish
38.description: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status conditions cured.

38.name: Helping Hand
38.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

38.name: Howl
38.description: The user howls loudly to rouse itself and its allies. This boosts their Attack stats.

38.name: Hypnosis
38.description: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall asleep.

38.name: Imprison
38.description: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

38.name: Laser Focus
38.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

38.name: Memento
38.description: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.

38.name: Mimic
38.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

38.name: Nasty Plot
38.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

38.name: Pain Split
38.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

38.name: Power Swap
38.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the target.

38.name: Protect
38.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

38.name: Psych Up
38.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

38.name: Reflect
38.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

38.name: Rest
38.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

38.name: Roar
38.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

38.name: Role Play
38.description: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.

38.name: Safeguard
38.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

38.name: Sleep Talk
38.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

38.name: Spite
38.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

38.name: Substitute
38.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

38.name: Sunny Day
38.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

38.name: Swagger
38.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

38.name: Tail Whip
38.description: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Defense stats.

38.name: Toxic
38.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

38.name: Will-O-Wisp
38.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

115.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

115.name: Captivate
115.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

115.name: Confide
115.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

115.name: Curse
115.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

115.name: Disable
115.description: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.

115.name: Double Team
115.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

115.name: Endure
115.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

115.name: Focus Energy
115.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

115.name: Foresight
115.description: Negates accuracy reduction moves.

115.name: Growl
115.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

115.name: Hail
115.description: Summons a hailstorm that strikes every turn.

115.name: Helping Hand
115.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

115.name: Leer
115.description: The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stats.

115.name: Mimic
115.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

115.name: Protect
115.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

115.name: Rain Dance
115.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

115.name: Rest
115.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

115.name: Roar
115.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

115.name: Safeguard
115.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

115.name: Sandstorm
115.description: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.

115.name: Sing
115.description: A soothing lullaby is sung in a beautiful voice that puts the target to sleep.

115.name: Sleep Talk
115.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

115.name: Spite
115.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

115.name: Substitute
115.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

115.name: Sunny Day
115.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

115.name: Swagger
115.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

115.name: Tail Whip
115.description: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Defense stats.

115.name: Toxic
115.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

115.name: Work Up
115.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

121.name: Giga Impact
121.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

121.name: Hyper Beam
121.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

121.name: Skull Bash
121.description: 1st turn: Prepare 2nd turn: Attack

121.name: Double-Edge
121.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

121.name: Meteor Beam
121.description: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

121.name: Zap Cannon
121.description: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

121.name: Blizzard
121.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

121.name: Hydro Pump
121.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

121.name: Thunder
121.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

121.name: Dream Eater
121.description: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

121.name: Ice Beam
121.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

121.name: Psychic
121.description: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

121.name: Surf
121.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

121.name: Take Down
121.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

121.name: Thunderbolt
121.description: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

121.name: Dazzling Gleam
121.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

121.name: Dive
121.description: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.

121.name: Expanding Force
121.description: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.

121.name: Flash Cannon
121.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

121.name: Power Gem
121.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

121.name: Psyshock
121.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

121.name: Scald
121.description: The user attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

121.name: Tri Attack
121.description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

121.name: Waterfall
121.description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

121.name: Signal Beam
121.description: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

121.name: Facade
121.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

121.name: Headbutt
121.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

121.name: Psycho Cut
121.description: The user tears at the target with blades formed by psychic power. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

121.name: Secret Power
121.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

121.name: Brine
121.description: This move's power is doubled if the target's HP is at half or less.

121.name: Bubble Beam
121.description: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target. This may also lower the target's Speed stat.

121.name: Psybeam
121.description: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This may also confuse the target.

121.name: Avalanche
121.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has inflicted damage on the user in the same turn.

121.name: Flip Turn
121.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

121.name: Hidden Power
121.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

121.name: Round
121.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

121.name: Swift
121.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

121.name: Water Pulse
121.description: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

121.name: Icy Wind
121.description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

121.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

121.name: Snore
121.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

121.name: Tackle

121.name: Twister

121.name: Water Gun
121.description: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

121.name: Whirlpool

121.name: Rollout
121.description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

121.name: Rage
121.description: Raises ATTACK if the user is hit.

121.name: Bide
121.description: Waits 2-3 turns & hits back double.

121.name: Frustration
121.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

121.name: Grass Knot
121.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

121.name: Gyro Ball
121.description: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

121.name: Natural Gift
121.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

121.name: Psywave
121.description: An attack with variable power.

121.name: Return
121.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

121.name: Confuse Ray

121.description: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

121.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

121.name: Flash

121.description: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to boost its Defense stat.

121.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

121.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

121.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

130.name: Strength

130.name: Facade

154.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

154.name: Energy Ball
154.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

154.name: Petal Blizzard
154.description: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

154.name: Rock Climb
154.description: A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It can also be used to scale rocky walls.

154.name: Take Down
154.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

154.name: Body Slam
154.description: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

154.name: Body Press
154.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

154.name: Grass Pledge
154.description: A column of grass hits the target. When used with its water counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast swamp appears.

154.name: Seed Bomb
154.description: The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

154.name: Strength
154.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power.

154.name: Tera Blast
154.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

154.name: Zen Headbutt
154.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

154.name: Giga Drain
154.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

154.name: Stomping Tantrum
154.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

154.name: Facade
154.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

154.name: Headbutt
154.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

154.name: Secret Power
154.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

154.name: Knock Off
154.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

154.name: Ancient Power
154.description: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also boost all the user's stats at once.

154.name: Bulldoze
154.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

154.name: Dragon Tail
154.description: The target is knocked away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

154.name: Hidden Power
154.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

154.name: Magical Leaf
154.description: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack never misses.

154.name: Round
154.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

154.name: Grassy Glide
154.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

154.name: Razor Leaf
154.description: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

154.name: Cut
154.description: Cuts using claws, scythes, etc.

154.name: Snore
154.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

154.name: Trailblaze
154.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

154.name: Weather Ball
154.description: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

154.name: Vine Whip
154.description: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines to inflict damage.

154.name: Echoed Voice
154.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.

154.name: Fury Cutter
154.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with scythes, claws, or the like. This attack becomes more powerful if it hits in succession.

154.name: Rock Smash
154.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

154.name: Tackle
154.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

154.name: Bullet Seed
154.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

154.name: Mud-Slap
154.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

154.name: Counter
154.description: A retaliatory attack that counters any physical move, inflicting double the damage taken.

154.name: Endeavor
154.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

154.name: Flail
154.description: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

154.name: Frustration
154.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

154.name: Grass Knot
154.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

154.name: Natural Gift
154.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

154.name: Return
154.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

154.name: Aromatherapy
154.description: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

154.name: Attract
154.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

154.name: Captivate
154.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

154.name: Charm
154.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

154.name: Confide
154.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

154.name: Curse
154.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

154.name: Detect
154.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

154.name: Double Team
154.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

154.name: Encore
154.description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

154.name: Endure
154.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

154.name: Fake Tears
154.description: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

154.name: Flash
154.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

154.name: Grassy Terrain
154.description: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

154.name: Growl
154.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

154.name: Heal Pulse
154.description: The user emits a healing pulse that restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP.

154.name: Helping Hand
154.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

154.name: Ingrain
154.description: The user lays roots that restore its own HP every turn. Because the user is now rooted, it can't switch out.

154.name: Laser Focus
154.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

154.name: Leech Seed
154.description: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

154.name: Light Screen
154.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

154.name: Magic Coat
154.description: Reflects special effects back to the attacker.

154.name: Mimic
154.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

154.name: Nature Power
154.description: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

154.name: Poison Powder
154.description: The user scatters a cloud of poisonous dust that poisons the target.

154.name: Protect
154.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

154.name: Reflect
154.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

154.name: Rest
154.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

154.name: Safeguard
154.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

154.name: Sleep Talk
154.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

154.name: Substitute
154.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

154.name: Sunny Day
154.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

154.name: Swagger
154.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

154.name: Sweet Scent
154.description: The user releases a scent that harshly lowers opposing Pokémon's evasiveness.

154.name: Swords Dance
154.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

154.name: Synthesis
154.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

154.name: Toxic
154.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

154.name: Work Up
154.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

154.name: Worry Seed

181.description: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.

181.name: Signal Beam
181.description: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

181.name: Stomping Tantrum
181.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

181.name: Thunder Punch
181.description: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

181.name: Facade
181.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

181.name: Headbutt
181.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

181.name: Secret Power
181.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

181.name: Volt Switch
181.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

181.name: Breaking Swipe
181.description: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.

181.name: Brutal Swing
181.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

181.name: Bulldoze
181.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

181.name: Dragon Tail
181.description: The target is knocked away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

181.name: Hidden Power
181.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

181.name: Round
181.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

181.name: Shock Wave
181.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

181.name: Swift
181.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

181.name: Electroweb
181.description: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

181.name: Charge Beam
181.description: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

181.name: Snore
181.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

181.name: Trailblaze
181.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

181.name: Echoed Voice
181.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.

181.name: Power-Up Punch
181.description: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

181.name: Rock Smash
181.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

181.name: Tackle
181.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

181.name: Thunder Shock
181.description: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

181.name: Counter
181.description: A retaliatory attack that counters any physical move, inflicting double the damage taken.

181.name: Electro Ball
181.description: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

181.name: Endeavor
181.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

181.name: Fling
181.description: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This move's power and effects depend on the item.

181.name: Frustration
181.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

181.name: Low Kick
181.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

181.name: Natural Gift
181.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

181.name: Return
181.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

181.name: Seismic Toss
181.description: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

181.name: After You
181.description: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

181.name: Agility
181.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

181.name: Attract
181.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

181.name: Captivate
181.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

181.name: Charge
181.description: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

181.name: Confide
181.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

181.name: Confuse Ray
181.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

181.name: Cotton Guard
181.description: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically boosting its Defense stat.

181.name: Cotton Spore
181.description: The user releases cotton-like spores that cling to opposing Pokémon. This harshly lowers their Speed stats.

181.name: Curse
181.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

181.name: Defense Curl
181.description: The user curls up and boosts its Defense stat.

181.name: Double Team
181.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

181.name: Dragon Cheer
181.description: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

181.name: Eerie Impulse
181.description: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

181.name: Electric Terrain
181.description: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.

181.name: Endure
181.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

181.name: Flash
181.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

181.name: Growl
181.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

181.name: Heal Bell
181.description: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.

181.name: Helping Hand
181.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

181.name: Ion Deluge
181.description: The user disperses electrically charged particles, which changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

181.name: Laser Focus
181.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

181.name: Light Screen
181.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

181.name: Magnet Rise
181.description: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

181.name: Magnetic Flux
181.description: The user manipulates magnetic fields, which boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus Ability or the Minus Ability.

181.name: Mimic
181.description: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.

181.name: Protect
181.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

181.name: Rain Dance
181.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

181.name: Reflect
181.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

181.name: Rest
181.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

181.name: Roar
181.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

181.name: Safeguard
181.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

181.name: Sleep Talk
181.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

181.name: Substitute
181.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

181.name: Sunny Day
181.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

181.name: Swagger
181.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

181.name: Thunder Wave
181.description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

181.name: Toxic
