652.description: The user throws a stone or similar projectile to attack the target. If the target is in the air, it will be knocked down to the ground.

652.name: Snore
652.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

652.name: Trailblaze
652.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

652.name: Vine Whip
652.description: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines to inflict damage.

652.name: Dual Chop
652.description: The user attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row.

652.name: Power-Up Punch
652.description: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

652.name: Rock Smash
652.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

652.name: Tackle
652.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

652.name: Feint
652.description: This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect. This also lifts the effects of those moves.

652.name: Rollout
652.description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

652.name: Bullet Seed
652.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

652.name: Pin Missile
652.description: The user attacks by shooting sharp spikes at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

652.name: Mud-Slap
652.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

652.name: Endeavor
652.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

652.name: Fling
652.description: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This move's power and effects depend on the item.

652.name: Frustration
652.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

652.name: Grass Knot
652.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

652.name: Gyro Ball
652.description: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

652.name: Low Kick
652.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

652.name: Return
652.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

652.name: Reversal
652.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

652.name: Super Fang
652.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

652.name: Attract
652.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

652.name: Belly Drum
652.description: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses HP equal to half its max HP.

652.name: Block
652.description: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent the target from fleeing.

652.name: Bulk Up
652.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

652.name: Coaching
652.description: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

652.name: Confide
652.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

652.name: Curse
652.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

652.name: Double Team
652.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

652.name: Endure
652.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

652.name: Flash
652.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

652.name: Grassy Terrain
652.description: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

652.name: Growl
652.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

652.name: Helping Hand
652.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

652.name: Hone Claws
652.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

652.name: Iron Defense
652.description: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

652.name: Leech Seed
652.description: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

652.name: Nature Power
652.description: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

652.name: Pain Split
652.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

652.name: Protect

652.name: Quick Guard
652.description: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves.

652.name: Rain Dance
652.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

652.name: Reflect
652.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

652.name: Rest

652.name: Roar

652.name: Scary Face

652.name: Sleep Talk

652.name: Spikes
652.description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

652.name: Spiky Shield
652.description: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also damages any attacker that makes direct contact.

652.name: Substitute
652.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

652.name: Sunny Day
652.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

652.name: Swagger
652.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

652.name: Swords Dance
652.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

652.name: Synthesis
652.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

652.name: Taunt
652.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

652.name: Toxic
652.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

652.name: Wide Guard

652.name: Work Up
652.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

652.name: Worry Seed

670.name: Charm
670.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

670.name: Confide
670.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

670.name: Double Team
670.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

670.name: Endure

670.name: Flash
670.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

670.name: Grassy Terrain
670.description: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

670.description: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.

670.name: Helping Hand
670.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

670.name: Light Screen
670.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

670.name: Lucky Chant
670.description: The user chants an incantation toward the sky, preventing the foe from landing critical hits.

670.name: Magic Coat
670.description: Reflects special effects back to the attacker.

670.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

670.name: Rain Dance

670.name: Safeguard
670.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

670.name: Skill Swap
670.description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

670.name: Sleep Talk
670.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

670.name: Substitute
670.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

670.name: Sunny Day
670.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

670.name: Swagger

701.name: Endure
701.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

724.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

724.name: Peck
724.description: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.

724.name: Astonish
724.description: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

724.name: Bullet Seed
724.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

724.name: Fury Attack
724.description: The user attacks by jabbing the target with a horn, a beak, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.

724.name: Frustration
724.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

724.name: Grass Knot
724.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

724.name: Low Kick
724.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

724.name: Night Shade
724.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

724.name: Return
724.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

724.name: Reversal
724.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

724.name: Attract
724.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

724.name: Baton Pass
724.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

724.name: Bulk Up
724.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

724.name: Coaching
724.description: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

724.name: Confide
724.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

724.name: Confuse Ray
724.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

724.name: Curse
724.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

724.name: Defog
724.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

724.name: Double Team
724.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

724.name: Endure
724.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

724.name: Feather Dance
724.description: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

724.name: Foresight
724.description: Negates accuracy reduction moves.

724.name: Grassy Terrain
724.description: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

724.name: Growl
724.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

724.name: Haze
724.description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

724.name: Helping Hand
724.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

724.name: Imprison
724.description: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

724.name: Laser Focus
724.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

724.name: Light Screen
724.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

724.name: Nasty Plot
724.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

724.name: Nature Power
724.description: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

724.name: Protect
724.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

724.name: Rain Dance
724.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

724.name: Rest
724.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

724.name: Roost
724.description: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

724.name: Safeguard
724.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

724.name: Scary Face
724.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

724.name: Sleep Talk
724.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

724.name: Spite
724.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

724.name: Substitute
724.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

724.name: Sunny Day
724.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

724.name: Swagger
724.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

724.name: Swords Dance
724.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

724.name: Synthesis
724.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

724.name: Tailwind
724.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

724.name: Taunt
724.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

724.name: Toxic
724.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

724.name: Work Up
724.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

724.name: Worry Seed
724.description: A seed that causes worry is planted on the target. It prevents sleep by making the target's Ability Insomnia.

727.name: Blast Burn
727.description: The target is razed by a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.

727.name: Focus Punch
727.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

727.name: Giga Impact
727.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

727.name: Hyper Beam
727.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

727.name: Overheat
727.description: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

727.name: Close Combat
727.description: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

727.name: Double-Edge
727.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

727.name: Flare Blitz
727.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot and may leave the target with a burn.

727.name: Focus Blast
727.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

727.name: Mega Kick
727.description: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

727.name: Outrage
727.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

727.name: Superpower
727.description: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

727.name: Thrash
727.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

727.name: Fire Blast
727.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

727.name: Cross Chop

727.name: Earthquake
727.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

727.name: Heat Wave
727.description: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.

727.name: Flamethrower
727.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

727.name: Take Down

727.name: Blaze Kick
727.description: The user launches a kick that has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. This may also leave the target with a burn.

727.name: Body Slam

727.name: Dark Pulse

727.name: Fire Pledge

727.name: Iron Head
727.description: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

727.name: Leech Life
727.description: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

727.name: Mega Punch

727.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

727.description: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

727.name: Brick Break
727.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

727.name: Drain Punch
727.description: The user attacks with an energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

727.name: Fire Punch
727.description: The target is attacked with a fiery punch. This may also leave the target with a burn.

727.name: Lash Out
727.description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.

727.name: Stomping Tantrum
727.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

727.name: Temper Flare
727.description: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

727.name: Thunder Punch
727.description: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

727.name: Facade

727.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken some damage in the same turn.

727.name: Bite
727.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

750.name: Scary Face
750.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

750.name: Sleep Talk
750.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

750.name: Stealth Rock
750.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

750.name: Substitute
750.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

750.name: Sunny Day
750.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

750.name: Swagger
750.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

750.name: Toxic
750.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

763.name: Giga Impact
763.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

763.name: Hyper Beam
763.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

763.description: The target is attacked with a knee kick from a jump. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

763.description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

763.description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light's energy and attacks on the next turn.

763.description: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

763.description: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to lash the target.

763.name: Solar Beam
763.description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

763.name: Petal Blizzard
763.description: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

763.name: Play Rough
763.description: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

763.name: Take Down
763.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

763.name: Dazzling Gleam

763.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

763.name: Facade

784.name: Taunt

784.name: Toxic

784.name: Work Up

823.name: Giga Impact

823.name: Hyper Beam

823.name: Sky Attack

823.name: Steel Beam
823.description: The user fires a beam of steel that it collected from its entire body. This also damages the user.

823.name: Brave Bird
823.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

823.name: Double-Edge
823.description: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

823.name: Hurricane
823.description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

823.name: Fly
823.description: The user flies up into the sky on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

823.name: Take Down
823.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

823.name: Body Slam
823.description: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

823.name: Body Press
823.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

823.name: Drill Peck

823.name: Air Slash
823.description: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make the target flinch.

823.name: Facade

823.name: Retaliate
823.description: The user takes revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is boosted if an ally fainted in the previous turn.

823.name: Steel Wing

823.name: Bulk Up

823.name: Focus Energy
823.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

823.name: Hone Claws

823.name: Iron Defense

823.description: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat.

861.name: Torment
861.description: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

861.name: Trick
861.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

861.name: Wonder Room
861.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

867.name: Giga Impact
867.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

867.name: Hyper Beam
867.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

867.name: Poltergeist
867.description: The user attacks by controlling the target's item. This move fails if the target isn't holding an item.

867.name: Earthquake
867.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

867.name: Stone Edge
867.description: The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

867.name: Earth Power
867.description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

867.name: Energy Ball
867.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

867.name: Phantom Force
867.description: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes the target on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

867.name: Psychic
867.description: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

867.name: Dragon Pulse
867.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

867.name: Body Press
867.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

867.name: Dark Pulse
867.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

867.name: Shadow Ball
867.description: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

867.name: Slam
867.description: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, or the like to inflict damage.

867.name: Zen Headbutt
867.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

867.name: Rock Slide
867.description: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.

867.name: Facade
867.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

867.name: Shadow Claw
867.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with a sharp claw made from shadows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

867.name: Hex
867.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

867.name: Brutal Swing
867.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

867.name: Bulldoze
867.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

867.name: Revenge
867.description: An attack that gains power if injured by the foe.

867.name: Rock Tomb
867.description: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.

867.name: Round
867.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

867.name: Thief
867.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

867.name: Payback
867.description: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

867.name: Snore
867.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

867.name: Sand Tomb
867.description: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

867.name: Astonish
867.description: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

867.name: Rock Blast
867.description: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

867.name: Grass Knot
867.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

867.name: Night Shade
867.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

867.name: Ally Switch
867.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

867.name: Amnesia
867.description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

867.name: Attract
867.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

867.name: Calm Mind
867.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

867.name: Crafty Shield
867.description: The user protects itself and its allies from status moves with a mysterious power. This does not stop moves that do damage.

867.name: Curse
867.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

867.name: Destiny Bond
867.description: If the user is knocked out after using this move, the Pokémon that knocked it out will also faint. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

867.name: Disable
867.description: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.

867.name: Endure
867.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

867.name: Fake Tears
867.description: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

867.name: Guard Split
867.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Defense and Sp. Def stats with those of the target.

867.name: Guard Swap
867.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Defense and Sp. Def stats with the target.

867.name: Haze
867.description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

867.name: Imprison
867.description: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

867.name: Iron Defense
867.description: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

867.name: Mean Look
867.description: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.

867.name: Nasty Plot
867.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

867.name: Power Split
867.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with those of the target.

867.name: Power Swap
867.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the target.

867.name: Protect
867.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

867.name: Rain Dance
867.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

867.name: Rest
867.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

867.name: Safeguard
867.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

867.name: Sandstorm
867.description: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.

867.name: Scary Face
867.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

867.name: Skill Swap
867.description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

867.name: Sleep Talk
867.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

867.name: Stealth Rock
867.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

867.name: Substitute
867.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

867.name: Taunt
867.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

867.name: Toxic Spikes
867.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

867.name: Trick
867.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

867.name: Trick Room
867.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

867.name: Will-O-Wisp
867.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

867.name: Wonder Room
867.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

1019.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

1019.name: Sweet Scent
1019.description: The user releases a scent that harshly lowers opposing Pokémon's evasiveness.

1019.name: Withdraw
1019.description: The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, boosting its Defense stat.

1019.name: Yawn
1019.description: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.

10008.name: Overheat
10008.description: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10008.name: Poltergeist
10008.description: The user attacks by controlling the target's item. This move fails if the target isn't holding an item.

10008.name: Thunder
10008.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

10008.name: Dream Eater
10008.description: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

10008.name: Foul Play
10008.description: The user turns the target's strength against it. The higher the target's Attack stat, the greater the damage this move inflicts.

10008.name: Hyper Voice
10008.description: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

10008.name: Thunderbolt
10008.description: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

10008.name: Uproar
10008.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

10008.name: Dark Pulse
10008.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

10008.name: Discharge
10008.description: The user strikes everything around it by letting loose a flare of electricity. This may also leave those hit by the attack with paralysis.

10008.name: Shadow Ball
10008.description: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

10008.name: Tera Blast
10008.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

10008.name: Signal Beam
10008.description: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

10008.name: Facade
10008.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

10008.name: Rising Voltage
10008.description: The user attacks with electricity rising from the ground. This move's power is doubled if the target is on Electric Terrain.

10008.name: Secret Power
10008.description: An attack with effects that vary by location.

10008.name: Sucker Punch
10008.description: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

10008.name: Volt Switch
10008.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

10008.name: Hex
10008.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

10008.name: Hidden Power
10008.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

10008.name: Ominous Wind
10008.description: The user creates a gust of repulsive wind. It may also raise all the user’s stats at once.

10008.name: Round
10008.description: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

10008.name: Shock Wave
10008.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

10008.name: Swift
10008.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

10008.name: Thief
10008.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

10008.name: Electroweb
10008.description: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

10008.name: Charge Beam
10008.description: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10008.name: Snore
10008.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

10008.name: Thunder Shock
10008.description: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

10008.name: Astonish
10008.description: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

10008.name: Mud-Slap
10008.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

10008.name: Stored Power
10008.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

10008.name: Electro Ball
10008.description: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

10008.name: Frustration
10008.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

10008.name: Natural Gift
10008.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

10008.name: Night Shade
10008.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

10008.name: Return
10008.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

10008.name: Ally Switch
10008.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

10008.name: Charge
10008.description: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

10008.name: Confide
10008.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

10008.name: Confuse Ray
10008.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

10008.name: Defog
10008.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

10008.name: Double Team
10008.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

10008.name: Eerie Impulse
10008.description: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

10008.name: Electric Terrain
10008.description: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.

10008.name: Endure
10008.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

10008.name: Flash
10008.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

10008.name: Helping Hand
10008.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

10008.name: Light Screen
10008.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

10008.name: Nasty Plot
10008.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10008.name: Pain Split
10008.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

10008.name: Protect
10008.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

10008.name: Psych Up
10008.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

10008.name: Rain Dance
10008.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

10008.name: Reflect
10008.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

10008.name: Rest
10008.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

10008.name: Sleep Talk
10008.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

10008.name: Snatch
10008.description: Steals the effects of the move the foe uses next.

10008.name: Spite
10008.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

10008.name: Substitute
10008.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

10008.name: Sunny Day
10008.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

10008.name: Swagger
10008.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

10008.name: Telekinesis
10008.description: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns.

10008.name: Thunder Wave
10008.description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

10008.name: Toxic
10008.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

10008.name: Trick
10008.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

10008.name: Will-O-Wisp
10008.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

10009.name: Hydro Pump
10009.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

10011.name: Swift
10011.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

10011.name: Thief
10011.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

10011.name: Electroweb
10011.description: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

10011.name: Charge Beam
10011.description: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10011.name: Snore
10011.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

10011.name: Thunder Shock
10011.description: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

10011.name: Astonish
10011.description: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

10011.name: Mud-Slap
10011.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

10011.name: Stored Power

10011.name: Electro Ball

10011.name: Frustration
10011.description: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

10011.name: Natural Gift
10011.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

10011.name: Night Shade
10011.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

10011.name: Return
10011.description: An attack that is based on loyalty.

10011.name: Ally Switch
10011.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

10011.name: Charge
10011.description: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

10011.name: Confide
10011.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

10011.name: Confuse Ray
10011.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

10011.name: Defog
10011.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

10011.name: Double Team
10011.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

10011.name: Eerie Impulse
10011.description: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

10011.name: Electric Terrain
10011.description: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.

10011.name: Endure
10011.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

10011.name: Flash
10011.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

10011.name: Helping Hand
10011.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

10011.name: Light Screen
10011.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

10011.name: Nasty Plot
10011.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10011.name: Pain Split
10011.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

10011.name: Protect
10011.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

10011.name: Psych Up
10011.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

10011.name: Rain Dance
10011.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

10011.name: Reflect
10011.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

10011.name: Rest
10011.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

10011.name: Spite
10011.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

10011.name: Substitute
10011.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

10011.name: Sunny Day

10011.name: Swagger
10011.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

10011.name: Telekinesis

10011.name: Thunder Wave
10011.description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

10011.name: Toxic

10340.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

10340.name: Agility
10340.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

10340.name: Calm Mind
10340.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

10340.name: Confuse Ray
10340.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

10340.name: Curse
10340.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

10340.name: Endure
10340.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

10340.name: Fake Tears
10340.description: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

10340.name: Helping Hand
10340.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

10340.name: Hone Claws
10340.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

10340.name: Imprison
10340.description: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

10340.name: Leer
10340.description: The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stats.

10340.name: Nasty Plot
10340.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10340.name: Pain Split
10340.description: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

10340.name: Protect
10340.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

10340.name: Psych Up
10340.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

10340.name: Rain Dance
10340.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

10340.name: Rest
10340.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

10340.name: Roar
10340.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

10340.name: Scary Face
10340.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

10340.name: Sleep Talk
10340.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

10340.name: Snowscape
10340.description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

10340.name: Spite
10340.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

10340.name: Substitute
10340.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

10340.name: Swords Dance
10340.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

10340.name: Taunt
10340.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

10340.name: Torment
10340.description: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

10340.name: Trick
10340.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

10340.name: Will-O-Wisp
10340.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

10341.name: Focus Punch
10341.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

10341.name: Frenzy Plant
10341.description: The user slams the target with the roots of an enormous tree. The user can't move on the next turn.

10341.name: Giga Impact
10341.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

10341.name: Hyper Beam
10341.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

10341.name: Leaf Storm
10341.description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10341.name: Brave Bird
10341.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

10341.name: Close Combat
10341.description: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

10341.name: Focus Blast
10341.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

10341.name: Solar Beam
10341.description: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.

10341.name: Energy Ball
10341.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

10341.name: Leaf Blade
10341.description: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and cuts the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

10341.name: Take Down
10341.description: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.

10341.name: Triple Arrows
10341.description: The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.

10341.name: Aura Sphere
10341.description: The user lets loose a pulse of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

10341.name: Grass Pledge
10341.description: A column of grass hits the target. When used with its water counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast swamp appears.

10341.name: Seed Bomb
10341.description: The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

10341.name: Tera Blast
10341.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

10341.name: Air Slash
10341.description: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make the target flinch.

10341.name: Brick Break
10341.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

10341.name: Giga Drain
10341.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

10341.name: Facade
10341.description: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

10341.name: Psycho Cut
10341.description: The user tears at the target with blades formed by psychic power. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

10341.name: Shadow Claw
10341.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with a sharp claw made from shadows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

10341.name: Sucker Punch
10341.description: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

10341.name: U-turn
10341.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

10341.name: Knock Off
10341.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

10341.name: Low Sweep
10341.description: The user makes a swift attack on the target's legs, which lowers the target's Speed stat.

10341.name: Upper Hand
10341.description: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

10341.name: Aerial Ace
10341.description: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

10341.name: Air Cutter
10341.description: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

10341.name: Magical Leaf
10341.description: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack never misses.

10341.name: Pluck
10341.description: The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

10341.name: Rock Tomb
10341.description: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.

10341.name: Swift
10341.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

10341.name: Grassy Glide
10341.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

10341.name: Razor Leaf
10341.description: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

10341.name: Smack Down
10341.description: The user throws a stone or similar projectile to attack the target. If the target is in the air, it will be knocked down to the ground.

10341.name: Trailblaze
10341.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

10341.name: Dual Wingbeat
10341.description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

10341.name: False Swipe
10341.description: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

10341.name: Gust
10341.description: A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the target to inflict damage.

10341.name: Leafage
10341.description: The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves.

10341.name: Rock Smash
10341.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

10341.name: Shadow Sneak
10341.description: The user extends its shadow and attacks the target from behind. This move always goes first.

10341.name: Tackle
10341.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

10341.name: Peck
10341.description: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.

10341.name: Bullet Seed
10341.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

10341.name: Grass Knot
10341.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

10341.name: Low Kick
10341.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

10341.name: Night Shade
10341.description: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

10341.name: Reversal
10341.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

10341.name: Baton Pass
10341.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

10341.name: Bulk Up
10341.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

10341.name: Coaching
10341.description: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

10341.name: Confuse Ray
10341.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

10341.name: Defog
10341.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

10341.name: Double Team
10341.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

10341.name: Endure
10341.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

10341.name: Feather Dance
10341.description: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

10341.name: Focus Energy
10341.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

10341.name: Grassy Terrain
10341.description: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

10341.name: Growl
10341.description: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.

10341.name: Haze
10341.description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

10341.name: Helping Hand
10341.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

10341.name: Light Screen
10341.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

10341.name: Nasty Plot
10341.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

10341.name: Protect
10341.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

10341.name: Rain Dance
10341.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

10341.name: Rest
10341.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

10341.name: Roost
10341.description: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

10341.name: Scary Face
10341.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

10341.name: Sleep Talk
10341.description: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

10341.name: Spikes
10341.description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

10341.name: Substitute
10341.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

10341.name: Sunny Day
10341.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

10341.name: Swords Dance
10341.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

10341.name: Synthesis
10341.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

10341.name: Tailwind
10341.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

10341.name: Taunt
10341.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.
